title: hypericum gramineum
intro: Hypericum gramineum, also known as St. John's Wort grass, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its yellow flowers and quadrangular stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hypericum gramineum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of depression. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, teas, capsules, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health issues.
